notes: Delta subset Gamma with finitely many formulas; def:well-formed-formula types the elements. The defining concepts 'subset' and 'finite' have no local propositional node (search returns only cross-volume set-theory items), so they are treated as ambient/imported primitives -- candidate edges only if the graph imports def:subset / a finite-set node.
